meaning: adj.保管的,保管人的n.[宗]圣物保管容器
examples: The mother is usually the custodial parent after a divorce.
Nothing other than an immediate custodial sentence could be justified.
He told the team he might consider custodial work.
Colleges that use the PROFILE typically collect non-custodial parent information via the CSS Noncustodial PROFILE Application.
They handed down almost 1.2 million sentences during 2011, of which more than 46, 000 were custodial.
